_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors

_contextSnippet: we found AAV-K55-GFP achieved 30–40% transduction in ST88-14, 50–60% in RHT92 and over 20% in JH-2-002, a patient-derived xenograft (PDX) MPSNT
details: Patient-derived xenograft MPNST JH-2-002 achieved over 20% transduction with AAV-K55-GFP
